feed.title: Hi! I’m Sarah
feed.subtitle: Graduate student at Columbia University studying Computer Science with a focus in Machine Learning. Interested in AI interpretability and governance, as well as its applications for social impact.

entry.title: Muse: A Holistic Habit Tracker
entry.content: Muse is an app that transforms habit-building into a visually and emotionally immersive experience, helping you become your own muse. Through a dynamic interface, Muse seamlessly integrates with Pinterest, Spotify, Google Calendar, and other favorite apps, curating mood boards, playlists, and reminders to make each habit a personalized journey. Every few hours, Muse refreshes with custom notifications that inspire action through vivid visuals and mood-matching sounds. Users can match and share habits with friends, fostering accountability, connection, and a collective approach to self-improvement.
entry.summary: Muse is an app that transforms habit-building into a visually and emotionally immersive experience, helping you become your own muse. Through a dynamic interface, Muse seamlessly integrates with Pinterest, Spotify, Google Calendar, and other favorite apps, curating mood boards, playlists, and reminders to make each habit a personalized journey. Every few hours, Muse refreshes with custom notifications that inspire action through vivid visuals and mood-matching sounds. Users can match and share habits with friends, fostering accountability, connection, and a collective approach to self-improvement.

entry.title: MANI: Fingerspelling Virtual Assistant
entry.content:
MANI is a gesture-based virtual assistant that operates with a display and a rotating camera. Users can raise their hand, sign to the camera usin finger-spelling, have their requests processed, and the results displayed visually. We have encoded shortcuts for common requests to reduce the letters needed. See the dmeo and project presentation below. Note: the final product used a rotating camera and display, but the demo linked uses the webcamera only.



Mani github

PDF testL
entry.summary: Gesture and finger-spelling based virtual assistant

entry.title: Temporal Symptom Extraction
entry.content:
A proposed a two-part extraction method that uses a CharacterBERTmedical to extract patient symptoms from doctor-patient dialogue, then uses a rule-based classifier to determine whether the symptom is current or past.

PDF testL
entry.summary: Two-part symptom extraction method from doctor-patient dialogues

entry.title: Dartmeet
entry.content:
Dartmeet is a location-centered social media platform that displays students and alumni. Inspired by the difficulties finding connections during the pandemic, Dartmeet allowed Dartmouth students and alumni to find eachother on and off campus, pursue friendhsips, and share interests and contact information. Dartmeet was designed using Figma and built with React Native. This was a project for a Human Centered Design class.



Dartmeet Website

Dartmeet github

PDF

Project Report
entry.summary: Location-centered social media platform that displays students and alumni

entry.title: The Ethics of Recommender Systems
entry.content:
This is a research paper that explore the ethical issues related to commonly used recommender systems in various digital services, including user addiction, extreme content exposure, user privacy, and discrimination.

<!DOCTYPE html>

PDF

Research Paper
entry.summary: Research Paper exploring the ethics of recommender systems commonly used in digital services and applications

entry.title: Keyboard to Morse Code Translator
entry.content:
This Morse code translator was a project for a Digital Electronics course. The user can input a message on the computer keyboard and then the message is displayed in Morse code via a flashing light on the FPGA. Each ASCII encoded character from the message is received as a serial stream, stored in a first-in-first-out queue, and then a lookup table is used to output the correct morse code. More details on implementation can be found in the project report below.

PDF

Project Report

PDF

Project Appendix
entry.summary: Translates keyboard input to Morse code using a FPGA to display message
